name: snapshot_ts
description: When the snapshot was taken (partition column)

name: processed_at
description: When the Cloud Function processed the message

name: last_price
description: Most recent trade price; NULL if no trades received

name: open_price
description: First trade price of the session; NULL if no trades received

name: pct_change
description: Session price change percent; NULL if price unavailable

name: trade_count
description: Trades received this session for this symbol

name: total_volume
description: Cumulative session volume for this symbol

name: last_trade_ts
description: Timestamp of last trade; NULL if no trades received

name: is_stale
description: True if no trade received in last SECTOR_STALE_SECS seconds
